description: Input schema for Kling O3 Reference-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the video. Reference style images as @Image1, @Image2, etc.
examples: A woman in the style of @Image1 walks through a garden
prompt.title: Prompt

start_image.description: Optional starting frame image for the video.
start_image.title: Start Image

end_image.description: Optional ending frame image. The video will transition toward this image.
end_image.title: End Image

image_urls.description: Style reference images. Referenced in the prompt as @Image1, @Image2, etc.
image_urls.title: Image Urls

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (3-15).

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate audio for the video.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

tier.description: Model tier. Pro offers higher quality, standard is faster and cheaper.

title: AppInput
